nasb.text: so that all will honor the Son even as they honor the Father. He who does not honor the Son does not honor the Father who sent Him.

esv.text: that all may honor the Son, just as they honor the Father. Whoever does not honor the Son does not honor the Father who sent him.

cnv.text: 使所有的人尊敬子好像尊敬父一樣。不尊敬子的，就是不尊敬那差他來的父。

ccb.text: 叫人尊敬子如同尊敬父。不尊敬子的，就是不尊敬差子来的父。

csbs.text: 好使所有的人都尊重子，就像尊重父那样。不尊重子的，就是不尊重派他来的父。
